title: JsonReport
description: Output schema for `file_system_a_star --json`. Pin schema_version to detect breaking format changes.

schema_version.description: Format version. Pin this in your consumer; only bumps on breaking changes.

version.description: Binary version (CARGO_PKG_VERSION). Bumps more often than schema_version.

root.description: Absolute path that was scanned (canonicalized when possible).

root_name.description: Display name of the root directory; also the key for the root node in `nodes`/`edges`.

elapsed_ms.description: Total wall-clock time of the scan, in milliseconds.

threads.description: Resolved worker thread count used for the parallel scan.

max_nodes.description: Node cap. `null` means unbounded (--no-limit). May reflect the memory soft-cap when --no-limit was used without --no-mem-cap.

tree_mode.description: True when --tree (skip per-file stat) was used. Implies size=0, mode=0, is_exec=false on file nodes.

total_size_bytes.description: Sum of `size` over all nodes. Always 0 in tree_mode. Fits safely in JS Number for any realistic filesystem (<= 2^53 = ~9 PB).

truncated.description: True when the scan stopped early because max_nodes was reached.

depths.description: BFS depth from root for every node. Keys are node IDs (path strings).

nodes.description: Map of node ID to its metadata. Keys are forward-slash-separated relative paths from root (or `root_name` for the root itself).

edges.description: Adjacency list. Keys are node IDs; values are arrays of neighbor node IDs (undirected: each edge appears in both directions).

path.description: A* result. `null` when start equals goal or no path was requested.

is_hidden.description: True when the leaf name starts with `.`.

is_exec.description: True when any execute bit is set (Unix). Always false in tree_mode and on non-Unix platforms.

mode.description: Unix permission bits (st_mode & 0o7777). 0 in tree_mode and on non-Unix.

size.description: File size in bytes. 0 for directories and in tree_mode.

name.description: Leaf name only (not the full path). Sanitized: control characters are replaced with '?'.

hops.description: Number of edges in the path (= nodes.length - 1).

nodes.description: Path nodes in order from start to goal, inclusive.
